purpose: Deterministic source-contract/parity pack for the GeneratedSpec approval ceremony foundation. It checks canonical hashes, immutable challenge-grant-consumption bindings, pinned classical Ed25519 envelopes, expiry, and the test-only single-use lifecycle path.
replay_boundary: The Go fixture executes a second consume and requires transition_conflict. The Python verifier checks the declared state path only; neither is durable replay, concurrency, or recovery proof.
boundaries: This pack is not Postgres durability, RLS/FENCE/CAS, runtime transport, Control Plane atomic reviewed-to-approved projection, workload identity, client load, release, or production proof.
$comment: quantum_posture: classical_ed25519_only. vectors.json is the hash-pinning authority. The pack deliberately names its test-only memory-store lifecycle boundary and makes no post-quantum or production-authority claim.
